loop1.title: Today's Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active energy consumption for the month; reactive energy, SEC, and subsidy metrics are not measured or configured for this asset.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing weekly active and reactive power trends; rated and contracted power lines are omitted because the asset's nameplate ratings are unknown.

loop1.title: Input vs Output Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active power and derived efficiency/loss — per-phase power and dedicated output energy aren't measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Load Anomalies
loop1.note: Showing actual load trend and load factor — anomaly/dip/surge event counts are not measured by this meter.
